function renderDesignTemplates(isFirstRun) {
    let container = document.getElementById('design-templates');
    if (!container) return;

    container.innerHTML = '';
    const coversToShow = state.config.designSettings.covers;

    coversToShow.forEach(design => {
        const wrapper = document.createElement('div');
        wrapper.className = 'cover-wrapper';
        if (design.isSelected) {
            wrapper.classList.add('selected');
        }
        wrapper.dataset.coverId = design.id;

        const thumbnail = document.createElement('div');
        thumbnail.className = 'cover-thumbnail';
        thumbnail.style.backgroundImage = `url(${design.thumbnailUrl})`;

        wrapper.appendChild(thumbnail);

        // Add premium icon if applicable
        const iconHtml = getIconHtml(design.iconType, 'cover-icon');
        if (iconHtml) {
            wrapper.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', iconHtml);
        }

        container.appendChild(wrapper);
    });

    const showAllButton = document.getElementById('show-all-designs-button');
    if (showAllButton) {
        showAllButton.style.display = 'none';
    }
}

function partitionAndRenderPhotos(designLimit) {
    const availablePhotos = state.config.photos.filter(p => p.opacity === undefined || p.opacity === 1);
    const hiddenPhotos = state.config.photos.filter(p => p.opacity !== undefined && p.opacity < 1);

    state.photos = availablePhotos.slice(0, designLimit);
    state.excludedPhotos = availablePhotos.slice(designLimit).concat(hiddenPhotos);

    if (state.photos.length > 0) {
        state.photos.forEach((p, i) => p.isHero = (i === 0));
    }

    renderGrid();
    renderExcludedPhotos();

    // DISABLED - excluded container hidden but preserved for future use
    // const excludedContainer = document.getElementById('excluded-container');
    // if (excludedContainer) {
    //     if (state.excludedPhotos.length > 0) {
    //         excludedContainer.style.display = 'block';
    //     } else {
    //         excludedContainer.style.display = 'none';
    //     }
    // }
}

function renderPhotoSection() {
    const photoGrid = document.getElementById('photo-grid');
    const excludedContainer = document.getElementById('excluded-container');
    const addButtonWrapper = document.getElementById('add-photos-button-wrapper');
    const editSelectionButton = document.getElementById('edit-selection-button');
    const photoSectionTitle = document.getElementById('photo-section-title');
    const photoSectionIcon = document.getElementById('photo-section-icon');

    if (!photoGrid || !excludedContainer) return;

    if (state.config.photos && state.config.photos.length > 0) {
        if (photoSectionTitle) photoSectionTitle.textContent = state.config.lang.arrangePhotosTitle;
        if (photoSectionIcon) photoSectionIcon.style.display = 'inline';
        if (editSelectionButton) editSelectionButton.style.display = 'inline';

        photoGrid.style.display = 'block';
        // DISABLED - excludedContainer.style.display = 'block';
        if (addButtonWrapper) {
            addButtonWrapper.style.display = 'none';
            addButtonWrapper.innerHTML = '';
        }
        partitionAndRenderPhotos(state.config.designSettings.photoCount);
    } else {
        if (photoSectionTitle) photoSectionTitle.textContent = `Add ${state.config.designSettings.photoCount} photos to design`;
        if (photoSectionIcon) photoSectionIcon.style.display = 'none';
        if (editSelectionButton) editSelectionButton.style.display = 'none';

        photoGrid.style.display = 'none';
        excludedContainer.style.display = 'none';

        if (addButtonWrapper) {
            addButtonWrapper.style.display = 'block';
            const addButton = document.createElement('div');
            addButton.className = 'w-128px h-80px bg-F2F2F2 flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer';
            addButton.innerHTML = `
                <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                    <path d="M12 5V19M5 12H19" stroke="#444444" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                </svg>
            `;
            addButton.addEventListener('click', () => {
                window.myop_cta_handler('edit_selection_click', { scene_id: state.config.sceneId });
            });
            addButtonWrapper.innerHTML = '';
            addButtonWrapper.appendChild(addButton);
        }
    }
}

function renderGrid() {
    const grid = document.getElementById('photo-grid');
    grid.innerHTML = '';
    const gridLayout = arrangePhotosInRows(state.photos);
    gridLayout.forEach((row, rowIndex) => {
        const rowElement = document.createElement('div');
        rowElement.className = 'flex items-start justify-start custom-gap mb-2';
        if (rowIndex === gridLayout.length - 1) {
            rowElement.classList.add('mb-0');
        }
        row.forEach((photo) => {
            if (photo.isHero) {
                const heroGroup = createHeroGroup(photo);
                rowElement.appendChild(heroGroup);
            } else {
                const photoElement = createPhotoItem(photo);
                rowElement.appendChild(photoElement);
            }
        });
        grid.appendChild(rowElement);
    });
}

function renderExcludedPhotos() {
    const container = document.getElementById('excluded-photos');
    container.innerHTML = '';
    state.excludedPhotos.forEach(photo => {
        const photoElement = createPhotoItem(photo, true);
        container.appendChild(photoElement);
    });
}

function createPhotoItem(photo, isExcluded = false) {
    const isVideo = photo.isVideo || photo.hasPlayButton;
    const container = document.createElement('div');
    container.className = 'relative cursor-pointer photo-item';
    container.style.width = photo.width + 'px';
    container.style.height = photo.height + 'px';
    container.style.border = 'none';
    if (photo.opacity && !isExcluded) {
        container.style.opacity = photo.opacity;
    }
    container.draggable = true;
    container.dataset.photoId = photo.id;

    const img = document.createElement('img');
    img.src = photo.src;
    img.alt = photo.alt;
    img.className = 'w-full h-full object-cover';
    container.appendChild(img);

    const focalPoint = document.createElement('div');
    focalPoint.className = 'focal-point';
    focalPoint.style.left = `${photo.focalPoint.x}%`;
    focalPoint.style.top = `${photo.focalPoint.y}%`;
    container.appendChild(focalPoint);

    container.addEventListener('dragstart', (e) => {
        setDraggedPhotoId(photo.id);
        try { e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain', photo.id); } catch { }
        e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed = 'move';
        setTimeout(() => {
            container.style.opacity = '0.5';
        }, 0);
    });

    container.addEventListener('dragend', () => {
        setDraggedPhotoId(null);
        cleanupPlaceholder();
        if (photo.opacity && !isExcluded) {
            container.style.opacity = photo.opacity;
        } else {
            container.style.opacity = '1';
        }
        window.myop_cta_handler('media_order_update', { scene_id: state.config.sceneId, order: state.config.photos.map(p => p.originalIndex) });

        // Reset indexes for future actions
        state.config.photos.forEach((p, index) => {
            p.originalIndex = index;
        });
    });

    if (isExcluded) {
        const excludedOverlay = document.createElement('div');
        excludedOverlay.className = 'absolute inset-0';
        excludedOverlay.style.backgroundColor = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4)';
        excludedOverlay.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
        container.appendChild(excludedOverlay);

        container.addEventListener('mouseenter', (e) => {
            const menu = document.getElementById('context-menu');
            if (!menu.classList.contains('visible') || currentContextMenuId !== photo.id) {
                showExcludedTooltip(e);
            }
        });
        container.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { hideExcludedTooltip(); });

        const menuDots = document.createElement('div');
        menuDots.className = 'absolute flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer menu-dots transition-opacity duration-200';
        menuDots.style.top = '0px';
        menuDots.style.right = '0px';
        menuDots.style.width = '25px';
        menuDots.style.height = '25px';
        menuDots.style.backgroundColor = 'rgba(34, 34, 34, 0.7)';
        menuDots.style.opacity = '1';
        menuDots.style.zIndex = '20';
        menuDots.innerHTML = `<svg width="16" height="4" fill="white" viewBox="0 0 16 4"><circle cx="2" cy="2" r="1.5"/><circle cx="8" cy="2" r="1.5"/><circle cx="14" cy="2" r="1.5"/></svg>`;
        container.appendChild(menuDots);
        menuDots.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            e.stopPropagation();
            const menu = document.getElementById('context-menu');
            const isVisible = menu.classList.contains('visible');
            if (isVisible && currentContextMenuId === photo.id) {
                hideContextMenu();
            } else {
                const rect = menuDots.getBoundingClientRect();
                showContextMenu(rect.left + window.scrollX, rect.bottom + window.scrollY + 4, photo.id, photo.isVideo, false);
            }
        });

    } else {
        const overlay = document.createElement('div');
        overlay.className = 'absolute inset-0 hover-overlay transition-opacity duration-200';
        overlay.style.backgroundColor = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4)';
        overlay.style.opacity = '0';
        container.appendChild(overlay);

        if (photo.hasExpandIcon) {
            const expandIcon = document.createElement('div');
            expandIcon.className = 'absolute transform rotate-90';
            expandIcon.style.top = '8px';
            expandIcon.style.left = '8px';
            expandIcon.innerHTML = `<svg width="14" height="14" fill="#374151" viewBox="0 0 14 14"><path d="M11.3917 4.36469L10.659 5.08921L12.0657 6.51354H7.51476V2.02826L8.88848 3.4701L9.63460 2.75795L7.00464 0L4.36540 2.60644L5.08988 3.34025L6.48421 1.9623V6.51354H1.99823L3.46986 5.11087L2.75878 4.36469L0 6.99587L2.60729 9.63531L3.34001 8.91077L1.99102 7.54416H6.48421V11.9707L5.11049 10.5299L4.36540 11.242L6.99536 14L9.63460 11.3925L8.91012 10.6597L7.51476 12.0387V7.54416H11.941L10.5301 8.88913L11.2423 9.63531L14 7.00515L11.3917 4.36469Z" /></svg>`;
            container.appendChild(expandIcon);
        }
        if (isVideo) {
            const playButton = document.createElement('div');
            playButton.className = 'absolute flex items-center justify-center';
            playButton.style.top = '0px';
            playButton.style.right = '0px';
            playButton.style.width = '25px';
            playButton.style.height = '25px';
            playButton.style.backgroundColor = '#000000';
            playButton.style.zIndex = '10';
            playButton.innerHTML = `<svg width="10" height="10" fill="white" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><polygon points="5,3 19,12 5,21" /></svg>`;
            container.appendChild(playButton);
        }

        const menuDots = document.createElement('div');
        menuDots.className = 'absolute flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer menu-dots transition-opacity duration-200';
        menuDots.style.top = isVideo ? '26px' : '0px';
        menuDots.style.right = '0px';
        menuDots.style.width = '25px';
        menuDots.style.height = '25px';
        menuDots.style.backgroundColor = 'rgba(34, 34, 34, 0.7)';
        menuDots.style.opacity = '1';
        menuDots.style.zIndex = '20';
        menuDots.innerHTML = `<svg width="16" height="4" fill="white" viewBox="0 0 16 4"><circle cx="2" cy="2" r="1.5"/><circle cx="8" cy="2" r="1.5"/><circle cx="14" cy="2" r="1.5"/></svg>`;
        container.appendChild(menuDots);
        menuDots.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            e.stopPropagation();
            const menu = document.getElementById('context-menu');
            const isVisible = menu.classList.contains('visible');
            if (isVisible && currentContextMenuId === photo.id) {
                hideContextMenu();
            } else {
                const rect = menuDots.getBoundingClientRect();
                showContextMenu(rect.left + window.scrollX, rect.bottom + window.scrollY + 4, photo.id, photo.isVideo, false);
            }
        });

        container.addEventListener('drop', (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            if (!draggedPhotoId || draggedPhotoId === photo.id) return;

            const rect = container.getBoundingClientRect();
            const before = (e.clientX - rect.left) < rect.width / 2;
            const position = before ? 'before' : 'after';

            reorderPhotos(draggedPhotoId, photo.id, position);
            cleanupPlaceholder();
        });

        container.addEventListener('dragover', (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            if (!draggedPhotoId || draggedPhotoId === photo.id || photo.isHero) return;

            const draggedObj = state.config.photos.find(p => p.id === draggedPhotoId);
            if (!draggedObj) return;
            const rect = container.getBoundingClientRect();
            const before = (e.clientX - rect.left) < rect.width / 2;
            const ph = ensurePlaceholder(draggedObj.width, draggedObj.height);
            const parent = container.parentNode;
            if (before) {
                if (ph.parentNode !== parent || ph.nextSibling !== container) {
                    parent.insertBefore(ph, container);
                }
            } else {
                if (ph.parentNode !== parent || ph.previousSibling !== container) {
                    if (container.nextSibling) parent.insertBefore(ph, container.nextSibling);
                    else parent.appendChild(ph);
                }
            }
        });
    }

    return container;
}

function createHeroGroup(heroPhoto) {
    const container = document.createElement('div');
    container.className = 'hero-group';
    const photoElement = createPhotoItem(heroPhoto);
    const labelElement = createHeroLabel();
    container.appendChild(photoElement);
    container.appendChild(labelElement);
    container.addEventListener('dragover', (e) => {
        if (!draggedPhotoId) return;
        const currentHero = state.photos.find(p => p.isHero);
        if (draggedPhotoId === currentHero?.id) return;
        e.preventDefault();
    });
    container.addEventListener('drop', (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        const currentHero = state.photos.find(p => p.isHero);
        if (!draggedPhotoId || draggedPhotoId === currentHero?.id) return;

        reorderPhotos(draggedPhotoId, null, null);
        cleanupPlaceholder();
    });
    return container;
}

function createHeroLabel() {
    const heroPhoto = state.photos.find(p => p.isHero);
    const container = document.createElement('div');
    container.className = 'relative bg-gray-100 flex items-center justify-center';
    container.style.width = '56px';
    container.style.height = '80px';
    if (heroPhoto) {
        const label = document.createElement('div');
        label.className = 'absolute';
        label.style.top = '25px';
        label.style.left = '50%';
        label.style.transform = 'translateX(-50%)';
        label.style.fontSize = '12px';
        label.style.color = '#444444';
        label.style.letterSpacing = '0.1px';
        label.style.padding = '2px 6px';
        label.textContent = state.config.lang.labelHero || 'Hero';
        container.appendChild(label);
        const helpIcon = document.createElement('div');
        helpIcon.className = 'absolute cursor-pointer hover-opacity-80 transition-opacity';
        helpIcon.style.top = '45px';
        helpIcon.style.left = '50%';
        helpIcon.style.transform = 'translateX(-50%)';
        helpIcon.innerHTML = `<svg width="16" height="16" fill="none" stroke="#9ca3af" viewBox="0 0 16 16" stroke-width="1.3"><circle cx="8" cy="8" r="7"/><path d="M6.67256 5.64676C7.56227 4.37443 9.77870 4.12846 10.1056 5.83098C10.3235 6.96599 9.71577 7.87263 8.28249 8.55089L8.42911 9.69223"/><line x1="8.30537" y1="11.3497" x2="8.30537" y2="11.8203" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>`;

        const tooltip = document.getElementById('help-tooltip');
        let leaveTimeout;

        const show = (e) => {
            clearTimeout(leaveTimeout);
            showHelpTooltip(e);
        };

        const hide = () => {
            leaveTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                hideHelpTooltip();
            }, 100);
        };

        helpIcon.addEventListener('mouseenter', show);
        helpIcon.addEventListener('mouseleave', hide);
        tooltip.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => clearTimeout(leaveTimeout));
        tooltip.addEventListener('mouseleave', hide);
        container.appendChild(helpIcon);
    }
    return container;
}

function showContextMenu(x, y, photoId, isVideo, isExcluded = false) {
    const menu = document.getElementById('context-menu');
    currentContextMenuId = photoId;
    let menuItemsHTML = '';

    if (isExcluded) {
        menuItemsHTML = `
            <div class="context-menu-item px-4 py-2 hover-bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer" style="font-size: 14px; color: #444444;" data-action="delete">${state.config.lang.contextMenuDelete}</div>
        `;
    } else {
        menuItemsHTML = `
            <div class="context-menu-item px-4 py-2 hover-bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer" style="font-size: 14px; color: #444444;" data-action="focal">${state.config.lang.contextMenuFocalPoint}</div>
            <div class="context-menu-item px-4 py-2 hover-bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer" style="font-size: 14px; color: #444444;" data-action="replace">${state.config.lang.contextMenuReplace}</div>
        `;
        if (isVideo) {
            menuItemsHTML += `
                <div class="context-menu-item px-4 py-2 hover-bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer" style="font-size: 14px; color: #444444;" data-action="trim">${state.config.lang.contextMenuTrimVideo}</div>
            `;

            // Only show duplicate option if selected design's maxMediaAmount > 1
            if (state.config && state.config.designSettings && state.config.designSettings.covers) {
                const selectedCover = state.config.designSettings.covers.find(c => c.isSelected);
                if (selectedCover && selectedCover.maxMediaAmount && selectedCover.maxMediaAmount > 1) {
                    menuItemsHTML += `
                        <div class="context-menu-item px-4 py-2 hover-bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer" style="font-size: 14px; color: #444444;" data-action="duplicate">${state.config.lang.contextMenuDuplicate}</div>
                    `;
                }
            }
        }
        if (state.photos.length > 1) {
            menuItemsHTML += `
                <div class="context-menu-item px-4 py-2 hover-bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer" style="font-size: 14px; color: #444444;" data-action="delete">${state.config.lang.contextMenuDelete}</div>
            `;
        }
    }

    menu.innerHTML = menuItemsHTML;

    menu.querySelectorAll('.context-menu-item').forEach(item => {
        item.addEventListener('click', () => {
            handleContextMenuAction(item.dataset.action);
        });
    });

    menu.style.left = x + 'px';
    menu.style.top = y + 'px';
    menu.classList.add('visible');
    scrollIntoViewIfNeeded(menu);
}

function hideContextMenu() {
    const menu = document.getElementById('context-menu');
    currentContextMenuId = null;
    menu.classList.remove('visible');
}

function showHelpTooltip(e) {
    const rect = e.currentTarget.getBoundingClientRect();
    const tooltip = document.getElementById('help-tooltip');
    tooltip.style.left = (rect.right + window.scrollX + 10) + 'px';
    tooltip.style.top = (rect.top + window.scrollY + rect.height / 2) + 'px';
    tooltip.style.transform = 'translateY(-50%)';
    tooltip.classList.remove('hidden');
}

function hideHelpTooltip() {
    const tooltip = document.getElementById('help-tooltip');
    tooltip.classList.add('hidden');
}

function showExcludedTooltip(e) {
    hideHelpTooltip();
    const rect = e.currentTarget.getBoundingClientRect();
    const tooltip = document.getElementById('excluded-tooltip');
    tooltip.style.left = (rect.right + window.scrollX + 10) + 'px';
    tooltip.style.top = (rect.top + window.scrollY + rect.height / 2) + 'px';
    tooltip.style.transform = 'translateY(-50%)';
    tooltip.classList.remove('hidden');
}

function hideExcludedTooltip() {
    const tooltip = document.getElementById('excluded-tooltip');
    tooltip.classList.add('hidden');
}

function handleContextMenuAction(action) {
    const photoId = currentContextMenuId;
    if (!photoId) return;

    const photo = state.config.photos.find(p => p.id === photoId) || state.excludedPhotos.find(p => p.id === photoId);
    if (!photo) {
        hideContextMenu();
        return;
    }
    const photoIndex = photo.originalIndex;

    window.myop_cta_handler('media_menu_action', { scene_id: state.config.sceneId, photo_index: photoIndex, menu_action: action });

    switch (action) {
        case 'delete':
            state.config.photos = state.config.photos.filter(p => p.id !== photoId);
            partitionAndRenderPhotos(state.config.designSettings.photoCount);
            break;
    }
    hideContextMenu();
}

function applyDesignSettings(settings) {
    if (!settings || !settings.colors || !settings.text) return;

    const colorModeKey = 'colorMode' + settings.colors.mode.split('_').map(s => s.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + s.slice(1)).join('');
    const colorModeLabel = document.getElementById('color-mode-label');
    if (colorModeLabel) colorModeLabel.textContent = state.config.lang[colorModeKey];

    const logoColorKey = 'logoColor' + settings.colors.logo.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + settings.colors.logo.slice(1);
    const logoColorLabel = document.getElementById('logo-color-label');
    if (logoColorLabel) logoColorLabel.textContent = state.config.lang[logoColorKey];

    const textStyleKey = 'textStyle' + settings.text.style.split('_').map(s => s.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + s.slice(1)).join('');
    const textStyleLabel = document.getElementById('text-style-label');
    if (textStyleLabel) textStyleLabel.textContent = state.config.lang[textStyleKey];

    const bgSwatch = document.getElementById('background-swatch');
    if (bgSwatch && settings.colors.manual) bgSwatch.style.backgroundColor = settings.colors.manual.background;

    const textSwatch = document.getElementById('text-swatch');
    if (textSwatch && settings.colors.manual) textSwatch.style.backgroundColor = settings.colors.manual.text;

    updateColorSwatchVisibility(false);
}

function updateManualColorPickersVisibility() {
    if (!state.config || !state.config.designSettings || !state.config.designSettings.covers) return;
    const selectedCover = state.config.designSettings.covers.find(c => c.isSelected);
    const configurableColors = selectedCover ? selectedCover.configurableColors : [];

    const backgroundPicker = document.getElementById('background-picker-container');
    const textPicker = document.getElementById('text-picker-container');

    if (backgroundPicker) {
        backgroundPicker.style.display = configurableColors.includes('background') ? 'block' : 'none';
    }
    if (textPicker) {
        textPicker.style.display = configurableColors.includes('text') ? 'block' : 'none';
    }
}

// Hide overlay checkbox - checked/unchecked icons
const HIDE_OVERLAY_UNCHECKED_SVG = `<svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none"><rect x="0.5" y="0.5" width="17" height="17" stroke="#D0D0D0"/></svg>`;
const HIDE_OVERLAY_CHECKED_SVG = `<svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none"><rect x="0.5" y="0.5" width="17" height="17" fill="white" stroke="#D0D0D0"/><path d="M4 9L7.5 12.5L14 6" stroke="#444444" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>`;

function updateHideOverlayCheckbox() {
    const checkbox = document.getElementById('hide-overlay-checkbox');
    const iconContainer = document.getElementById('hide-overlay-checkbox-icon');
    if (!checkbox || !iconContainer) return;

    const isChecked = state.config.designSettings.colors.blockOverlay === true;
    checkbox.checked = isChecked;
    iconContainer.innerHTML = isChecked ? HIDE_OVERLAY_CHECKED_SVG : HIDE_OVERLAY_UNCHECKED_SVG;
}

function initializeHideOverlayCheckbox() {
    const container = document.getElementById('hide-overlay-container');
    if (!container || container.dataset.initialized) return;

    container.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        const checkbox = document.getElementById('hide-overlay-checkbox');
        if (!checkbox) return;

        const newChecked = !checkbox.checked;
        checkbox.checked = newChecked;
        state.config.designSettings.colors.blockOverlay = newChecked;
        updateHideOverlayCheckbox();

        window.myop_cta_handler('color_hide_overlay_update', { checked: newChecked });
    });

    container.dataset.initialized = 'true';
}

function updateColorSwatchVisibility(shouldScroll = false) {
    const isManual = state.config.designSettings.colors.mode === 'manual';
    const swatchesContainer = document.getElementById('color-swatches-container');
    const logoColorWrapper = document.getElementById('logo-color-wrapper');
    const hideOverlayContainer = document.getElementById('hide-overlay-container');

    if (swatchesContainer) {
        if (isManual) {
            swatchesContainer.style.display = 'flex';
            updateManualColorPickersVisibility();
        } else {
            swatchesContainer.style.display = 'none';
        }
    }

    if (logoColorWrapper) {
        if (isManual) {
            logoColorWrapper.style.display = 'block';
        } else {
            logoColorWrapper.style.display = 'none';
        }
    }

    // Show/hide the hide overlay checkbox based on supportBlockOverlay DTO
    if (hideOverlayContainer) {
        const supportBlockOverlay = state.config.designSettings.colors.supportBlockOverlay === true;
        hideOverlayContainer.style.display = supportBlockOverlay ? 'block' : 'none';
        if (supportBlockOverlay) {
            updateHideOverlayCheckbox();
        }
    }

    if (shouldScroll && isManual && swatchesContainer) {
        scrollIntoViewIfNeeded(swatchesContainer);
    }
}

function updateTextStyleSectionVisibility(shouldScroll = false) {
    const container = document.getElementById('text-edit-container');
    const isManual = state.config.designSettings.text.style === 'manual';

    if (isManual) {
        container.classList.remove('hidden');
        container.style.display = 'block';
        if (shouldScroll) {
            scrollIntoViewIfNeeded(container);
        }
    } else {
        container.classList.add('hidden');
        container.style.display = 'none';
    }
}

function updateUIVisibility(mode) {
    const isDesignMode = mode === 'design';
    const photoContainer = document.getElementById('photo-arrangement-container');
    const photoDivider = document.getElementById('photo-section-hr');

    if (photoContainer) {
        photoContainer.classList.toggle('hidden', !isDesignMode);
    }
    if (photoDivider) {
        photoDivider.classList.toggle('hidden', !isDesignMode);
    }
}


// --- js/main.js ---
let globalClickListenerAttached = false;

// --- GLOBAL PUBLIC METHODS ---

window.myop_cta_handler = function (action_id, payload) {
    console.log("CTA Triggered | Action:", action_id, "| Payload:", payload);
    // In a real application, this would dispatch to the parent app/server
};

window.myop_init_interface = function (userConfig) {
    // Getter mode: return current state when called without arguments
    if (!userConfig) return state.config;

    // Handle clearRecentColors flag before anything else
    if (userConfig.clearRecentColors) {
        clearRecentColorsCookie();
    }

    try {
        const isFirstRun = !state.config;

        // Merge Config
        if (isFirstRun) {
            state.config = deepMerge(JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(initialDefaultConfig)), userConfig);
            state.isInitialLoad = true;
        } else {
            state.config = deepMerge(state.config, userConfig);
            state.isInitialLoad = false;
        }

        const initialMode = state.config.initialMode || 'design';

        // Inject External Fonts from Config
        if (state.config.fontCssUrl && isFirstRun) {
            const link = document.createElement('link');
            link.rel = 'stylesheet';
            link.href = state.config.fontCssUrl;
            document.head.appendChild(link);
        }

        // Add originalIndex to each photo for server reporting
        if (state.config.photos) {
            state.config.photos.forEach((photo, index) => {
                photo.originalIndex = index;
            });
        }

        // Initialize premium icon system
        currentLang = state.config.lang;
        if (state.config.icons) {
            ICON_SVGS = state.config.icons;
        }

        applyLanguage(state.config.lang);

        try {
            applyDesignSettings(state.config.designSettings);
        } catch (e) {
            console.error("Error applying design settings:", e);
        }

        try {
            initializeTextControls(state.config.designSettings.text.textElements);
        } catch (e) {
            console.error("Error initializing text controls: ", e);
        }

        initializeBackButton();
        initializeColorPicker();
        initializeHideOverlayCheckbox();

        initializeDropdown('color-mode-dropdown-trigger', 'color-mode-menu', 'color-mode-label', 'color_mode_update', 'mode');
        initializeDropdown('logo-color-dropdown-trigger', 'logo-color-menu', 'logo-color-label', 'logo_color_update', 'color');
        initializeDropdown('text-style-dropdown-trigger', 'text-style-menu', 'text-style-label', 'text_style_update', 'style');

        // --- STATE PERSISTENCE LOGIC ---
        const designContentEl = document.getElementById('design-content');
        const isDesignOpenInDOM = designContentEl && !designContentEl.classList.contains('hidden');
        const shouldDesignBeOpen = isFirstRun ? (initialMode === 'template') : isDesignOpenInDOM;

        const colorsContentEl = document.getElementById('colors-content');
        const isColorsOpenInDOM = colorsContentEl && !colorsContentEl.classList.contains('hidden');
        const shouldColorBeOpen = isFirstRun ? (state.config.designSettings.colors.mode === 'manual') : isColorsOpenInDOM;

        const textContentEl = document.getElementById('text-content');
        const isTextOpenInDOM = textContentEl && !textContentEl.classList.contains('hidden');
        const shouldTextBeOpen = isFirstRun ? (state.config.designSettings.text.style === 'manual') : isTextOpenInDOM;

        initializeCollapsible('design-trigger', 'design-content', shouldDesignBeOpen, false);
        initializeCollapsible('colors-trigger', 'colors-content', shouldColorBeOpen);
        initializeCollapsible('text-trigger', 'text-content', shouldTextBeOpen);

        updateColorSwatchVisibility(false);
        updateTextStyleSectionVisibility(false);

        try {
            renderPhotoSection();
        } catch (e) {
            console.error("Error rendering photo section:", e);
        }

        try {
            renderDesignTemplates(isFirstRun);
        } catch (e) {
            console.error("Error rendering designs:", e);
        }

        if (isFirstRun) {
            const learnMoreButton = document.querySelector('#lang-tooltipLearnMore');
            if (learnMoreButton) {
                learnMoreButton.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    window.myop_cta_handler('learn_more_click', { scene_id: state.config.sceneId });
                });
            }

            const editSelectionBtn = document.getElementById('edit-selection-button');
            if (editSelectionBtn) {
                editSelectionBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    window.myop_cta_handler('edit_selection_click', { scene_id: state.config.sceneId });
                });
            }

            const showAllDesignsBtn = document.getElementById('show-all-designs-button');
            if (showAllDesignsBtn) {
                showAllDesignsBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    window.myop_cta_handler('show_all_designs_click', {});
                });
            }

            const designTemplatesContainer = document.getElementById('design-templates');
            if (designTemplatesContainer) {
                designTemplatesContainer.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                    const wrapper = e.target.closest('.cover-wrapper');
                    if (wrapper) {
                        const coverId = wrapper.dataset.coverId;
                        state.config.designSettings.covers.forEach(c => {
                            c.isSelected = (c.id === coverId);
                        });
                        document.querySelectorAll('.cover-wrapper').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('selected'));
                        wrapper.classList.add('selected');
                        window.myop_cta_handler('design_cover_update', { cover_id: coverId, scene_id: state.config.sceneId });
                        applyDesignSettings(state.config.designSettings);
                    }
                });
            }
        }

        if (!globalClickListenerAttached) {
            document.addEventListener('dragover', dragScroll);

            document.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
                const target = e.target;

                document.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-menu.visible').forEach(menu => {
                    const parentContainer = menu.closest('.relative');
                    const triggerId = menu.id.replace('-menu', '-dropdown-trigger');
                    const trigger = document.getElementById(triggerId);

                    const clickedInsideMenu = menu.contains(target);
                    const clickedOnTrigger = trigger && trigger.contains(target);

                    if (!clickedInsideMenu && !clickedOnTrigger) {
                        menu.classList.remove('visible');
                        if (trigger) {
                            const arrow = trigger.querySelector('svg');
                            if (arrow) arrow.classList.remove('rotate-180');
                        }
                    }
                });

                const picker = document.getElementById('color-picker-wrapper');
                if (picker && !picker.classList.contains('hidden')) {
                    const clickedInsidePicker = picker.contains(target);
                    const clickedOnTrigger =
                        !!target.closest('#background-picker-trigger') ||
                        !!target.closest('#text-picker-trigger');

                    if (!clickedInsidePicker && !clickedOnTrigger) {
                        // Use the exposed API to close picker properly (handles recent colors)
                        if (window.colorPickerAPI && window.colorPickerAPI.closePicker) {
                            window.colorPickerAPI.closePicker();
                        } else {
                            picker.classList.add('hidden');
                        }
                    }
                }

                const contextMenu = document.getElementById('context-menu');
                if (contextMenu && contextMenu.classList.contains('visible')) {
                    const clickedInsideMenu = contextMenu.contains(target);
                    const clickedOnDots = !!target.closest('.menu-dots');

                    if (!clickedInsideMenu && !clickedOnDots) {
                        hideContextMenu();
                    }
                }
            }, true);

            globalClickListenerAttached = true;
        }

        updateUIVisibility(initialMode);

        // Attach tooltip listeners for premium icons
        attachTooltipListeners();

    } catch (e) {
        console.error("CRITICAL INIT ERROR:", e);
    }
};

// Expose initialDefaultConfig for preview script
window._myop_preview_data = initialDefaultConfig;

})();
</script>
